title: OBI Extension Configuration
description: Schema for the `extensions.obi` section in OTel declarative config files.

version.description:
OBI extension schema version.
Property is required and must be `2.0`.

capture.description:
Configure what OBI captures and how.
This block is valid in all deployment modes (standalone daemon and Collector receiver).
When running OBI as a Collector receiver, this is the sub-config that is embedded directly.
If omitted, defaults are used.

enrich.description:
Configure metadata enrichment behavior.
Standalone-mode only: not valid in Collector receiver deployments.
If omitted, enrichment defaults are used.

correlation.description:
Configure trace-context correlation features for external streams.
Standalone-mode only: not valid in Collector receiver deployments.
If omitted, correlation defaults are used.

daemon.description:
Configure OBI daemon process behavior (logging, profiling, shutdown, internal metrics).
Standalone-mode only: not valid in Collector receiver deployments.
If omitted, daemon defaults are used.

SignalEnabled.description: Enable/disable each signal explicitly for a protocol scope.

traces.description:
Enable trace signal generation for this scope.
If omitted, true is used.

metrics.description:
Enable metric signal generation for this scope.
If omitted, true is used.

MatchDefinition.description: Match expression using either an include (`match`) or exclude (`not_match`) wildcard pattern.

match.description:
Include wildcard pattern. Use `*` for zero or more characters and `?` for a single character.
Cannot be set together with `.not_match`.

not_match.description:
Exclude wildcard pattern. Use `*` for zero or more characters and `?` for a single character.
Cannot be set together with `.match`.

FilterMap.description: Map of filter keys to match definitions.

SignalFilters.description: Signal-specific filters for traces and metrics.

traces.description:
Filters applied to traces in this scope.
If omitted, no trace filtering is applied.

metrics.description:
Filters applied to metrics in this scope.
If omitted, no metric filtering is applied.

IntEnum.description: Comma-separated integer/range list, or an explicit integer array.

oneOf.description: Comma-separated integers or integer ranges, for example `80,443,8000-8999`.
CIDR range. The CIDR string is used as the attribute value.

name.description: Human-readable attribute value for this CIDR.

CIDRDefinitions.description: CIDR definitions used for source/destination grouping attributes.

SelectionExportsOTLP.description: Match predicate for detecting workloads that already export OTLP.

port.description:
OTLP receiver port expected on the target workload.
Value must be between 1 and 65535.

protocol.description: OTLP transport/protocol identifier expected on the target workload (for example `protobuf`).

open_ports.description: Open port selector. Accepts comma-separated ports/ranges or an integer array.

language_glob.description: Glob patterns matched against detected runtime language.

language_regex.description: Regular expression matched against detected runtime language.

cmd_args_glob.description: Glob patterns matched against process command-line arguments.

cmd_args_regex.description: Regular expression matched against process command-line arguments.

exe_path_glob.description: Glob patterns matched against process executable paths.

exe_path_regex.description: Regular expression matched against process executable paths.

containers_only.description: Restrict selection to processes running in containers.

exports_otlp.description: Predicate matching workloads that expose OTLP exports.

namespace_glob.description: Glob patterns matched against Kubernetes namespace names.

namespace_regex.description: Regular expression matched against Kubernetes namespace names.

metadata_glob.description: Glob patterns for non-namespace Kubernetes metadata keys.

metadata_regex.description: Regular expressions for non-namespace Kubernetes metadata keys.

pod_labels.description: Glob patterns for Kubernetes pod labels.

pod_labels_regex.description: Regular expressions for Kubernetes pod labels.

pod_annotations.description: Glob patterns for Kubernetes pod annotations.

pod_annotations_regex.description: Regular expressions for Kubernetes pod annotations.

SelectionRuleMatch.description: Rule match clause with light validation for known predicates while remaining extensible.

process.description: Process identity and runtime predicate matches.

SelectionRuleRefine.description:
Optional workload-scoped configuration overrides applied on top of global defaults when an include rule matches.
Only explicitly listed fields are overridable.
Only meaningful on include rules; ignored on exclude rules.

exports.description:
Override which signals are emitted for matched workloads.
If omitted, global instrumentation enablement applies.

traces.description:
Enable or disable trace emission for this workload.
If omitted, the global protocol trace enablement applies.

metrics.description:
Enable or disable metric emission for this workload.
If omitted, the global protocol metric enablement applies.

http.description: HTTP-specific per-workload configuration for matched workloads.

routes.description:
Per-workload direction-scoped HTTP route patterns.
If omitted, global route configuration applies.

incoming.description:
HTTP route patterns for requests handled by the matched workload.
Equivalent to v1 `routes.incoming`.

patterns.description: Explicit incoming route patterns for this workload.

outgoing.description:
HTTP route patterns for requests made by the matched workload.
Equivalent to v1 `routes.outgoing`.

patterns.description: Explicit outgoing route patterns for this workload.

filters.description:
Per-workload HTTP trace and metric filters.
These replace (not merge with) the global HTTP filters for matched workloads.
If omitted, global filters apply.

default_action.description:
Default action when no rule matches.
Values include: `include`, `exclude`.
If omitted, `include` is used.

match_order.description:
Rule evaluation order semantics.
Values include: `first_match_wins`, `last_match_wins`.
If omitted, `first_match_wins` is used.

poll_interval.description:
Polling interval used to refresh selection inputs.
If omitted, `5s` is used.

min_process_age.description:
Minimum process age required before a process becomes eligible for selection.
If omitted, `5s` is used.

SelectionRules.description:
Ordered selection rules.
If omitted, the default rule set is used.

default.name: exclude-obi-and-collectors
default.description: Exclude OBI and collector binaries to avoid self-instrumentation and collector recursion.

default.name: exclude-system-namespaces
default.description: Exclude common platform/system Kubernetes namespaces from instrumentation by default.

default.name: exclude-otlp-exporters
default.description: Exclude services that already export OTLP to prevent duplicate telemetry pipelines.

default.name: exclude-linux-system-paths
default.description: Exclude Linux system/service executable paths that are not typical application workloads.

action.description:
Rule action when `.match` evaluates true.
Values include: `include`, `exclude`.
Property is required and must be non-null.

name.description:
Human-readable rule name.
If omitted, implementation may derive a generated identifier.

description.description:
Human-readable rule intent.
If omitted, no description is recorded.

match.description:
Rule match clause. Known predicates are lightly validated while extension predicates remain allowed.
Property is required and must be non-null.

refine.description:
Optional workload-scoped configuration overrides for matched workloads.
Only meaningful on include rules; ignored on exclude rules.
If omitted, global defaults apply without modification.

Capture.description:
What OBI captures and how.
Valid in all deployment modes. When running as a Collector receiver, this block is embedded directly in the receiver config.

policy.description:
Global rule evaluation behavior.
If omitted, defaults are used.

rules.description:
Ordered workload selection rules.
If omitted, the default rule set is used.

instrumentation.description:
Protocol instrumentation controls.
If omitted, per-protocol defaults are used.

runtimes.description:
Runtime injection mechanisms (Go, Node.js, Java).
If omitted, runtime injection defaults are used.

network.description:
Network capture controls.
If omitted, network capture defaults are used.

limits.description:
Numeric limits to constrain memory and cardinality growth.
If omitted, defaults are used.

network_packets.description:
Maximum number of network packets to retain in internal processing windows.
Value must be positive.
If omitted, `5000` is used.

metric_span_names.description:
Maximum tracked span-name cardinality for derived metrics.
Value must be non-negative.
A value of `0` disables span-name limiting.
If omitted, `100` is used.

engine.description: eBPF engine internals: batching, pid filtering, BPF filesystem, context propagation, traffic backend, transaction limits, and debug toggles.

bpf.description:
Enable eBPF debug logging.
If omitted, false is used.

protocol_print.description:
Enable protocol debug printing.
If omitted, false is used.

disabled.description:
Disable PID-based filtering in discovery/capture flows.
If omitted, false is used.

wakeup_len.description:
Ringbuffer wakeup threshold for capture batching.
If omitted, `500` is used.

batch_length.description:
Maximum number of captured events grouped per batch.
If omitted, `100` is used.

batch_timeout.description:
Maximum time to wait before flushing a partial batch.
If omitted, `1s` is used.

oneOf.description: IP options injection has been removed and has no effect

context_propagation.description:
Context propagation mode.
Values include: `disabled`, `headers`, `tcp`, `all`.
If omitted, `disabled` is used.

override_bpfloop_enabled.description:
Override kernel bpf_loop capability checks.
If omitted, false is used.

disable_black_box_cp.description:
Disable black-box context propagation.
If omitted, false is used.

control_backend.description:
Traffic control backend selection.
Values include: `auto`, `tc`, `tcx`.
If omitted, `auto` is used.

high_request_volume.description:
Optimize capture behavior for high request volume workloads.
If omitted, false is used.

force_map_reader.description:
Force the network-flow per-CPU map reader implementation.
If omitted, `auto` is used.

max_duration.description:
Maximum duration allowed for correlating request/response transactions.
If omitted, `5m0s` is used.

global_scale_factor.description:
Global eBPF map size scale factor.
If omitted, `0` is used.

path.description:
Filesystem path used for pinned BPF objects/maps.
If omitted, `/sys/fs/bpf/` is used.

enforce_system_capabilities.description:
Enforce required system capabilities on startup.
If omitted, false is used.

buffer_len.description:
Runtime channel buffer length.
If omitted, `50` is used.

send_timeout.description:
Runtime channel send timeout.
If omitted, `1m0s` is used.

panic_on_send_timeout.description:
Panic when a runtime channel send timeout occurs.
If omitted, false is used.

telemetry.description: Reporter cache and metric TTL tuning for OBI capture internals.

reporters_cache_len.description:
Trace reporter cache size used by OBI internals.
If omitted, `256` is used.

ttl.description:
Metric time-to-live for stale metric series generated by OBI internals.
If omitted, `5m0s` is used.

reporters_cache_len.description:
Metric reporter cache size used by OBI internals.
If omitted, `256` is used.

Daemon.description: OBI daemon process controls. Standalone-mode only: not valid in Collector receiver deployments.

level.description:
OBI log level.
Values include: `DEBUG`, `INFO`, `WARN`, `ERROR`.
If omitted, `INFO` is used.

format.description:
Startup configuration log format. Empty string disables startup config logging.
Values include: `yaml`, `json`.
If omitted, empty string is used.

debug_trace_output.description:
Debug trace output mode.
Values include: `disabled`, `counter`, `text`, `json`, `json_indent`.
If omitted, `disabled` is used.

port.description:
Profiling server port. Set `0` to disable.
If omitted, `0` is used.

timeout.description:
Graceful shutdown timeout.
If omitted, `10s` is used.

internal_metrics.description: OBI daemon's own metrics exporter configuration.

exporter.description:
Internal metrics exporter mode.
Values include: `disabled`, `prometheus`, `otel`.
If omitted, `disabled` is used.

port.description:
Internal Prometheus exporter port. Set `0` to disable listener.
If omitted, `0` is used.

path.description:
Internal Prometheus metrics path.
If omitted, `/internal/metrics` is used.

scrape_interval.description:
Scrape interval for BPF internal metrics collection.
If omitted, `15s` is used.

telemetry.description: Prometheus-exporter-specific metric shaping for OBI standalone output.

allow_service_graph_self_references.description:
Allow service graph self-references in OBI-generated Prometheus metrics.
If omitted, false is used.

span_metrics_service_cache_size.description:
Service cache size for span-metrics aggregation in OBI-generated Prometheus metrics.
If omitted, `10000` is used.

extra_resource_attributes.description:
Additional resource attributes to include in OBI-generated Prometheus metrics.
If omitted, no extra attributes are added.

extra_span_resource_attributes.description:
Additional span resource attributes to include in OBI-generated Prometheus span metrics.
If omitted, no extra attributes are added.

InstrumentationProtocol.description: Shared envelope for a protocol/language instrumentation section.

enabled.description:
Enable controls for traces and metrics.
If omitted, signal defaults are used.

filters.description:
Signal-specific filters used by this section.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

enabled.description:
Enable HTTP traces/metrics.
If omitted, signal defaults are used.

filters.description:
Signal-specific HTTP filters.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

track_request_headers.description:
Capture configured inbound/outbound HTTP headers.
If omitted, false is used.

request_timeout.description:
HTTP request timeout guard for capture/processing.
If omitted, `0s` is used.

buffer_size.description:
HTTP parser/capture buffer size.
If omitted, `0` is used.

routes.description: HTTP route normalization and discovery controls.

unmatched.description:
Fallback route policy when no explicit pattern matches.
If omitted, `heuristic` is used.

patterns.description:
User-supplied route patterns.
If omitted, no explicit patterns are used.

ignored_patterns.description:
Route patterns to ignore.
If omitted, no patterns are ignored.

ignore_mode.description:
Signal mode for ignored patterns.
If omitted, `all` is used.

wildcard_char.description:
Wildcard replacement character for route templates.
If omitted, `*` is used.

max_path_segment_cardinality.description:
Maximum per-segment path cardinality in heuristic mode.
If omitted, `10` is used.

timeout.description:
Global timeout for route discovery runs.
If omitted, `10s` is used.

disabled_languages.description:
Languages excluded from route discovery.
If omitted, no languages are excluded.

delay.description:
Delay before Java route discovery starts.
If omitted, `5s` is used.

enabled.description:
Payload extractors enabled for HTTP-derived parsing.
If omitted, no payload extractors are enabled.

endpoint_patterns.description:
Endpoint patterns eligible for SQL++ payload extraction.
If omitted, `/query/service` is used.

enrichment.description: HTTP header and body enrichment policy and rules.

body.description: Default action for HTTP body payloads.

obfuscation_string.description: Replacement string used by obfuscation rules.

TraceAnnotation.description: Trace-context annotation controls for process logs.

enabled.description:
Enable trace-context annotation on log streams for selected workloads.
If omitted, false is used.

filter.description:
Attribute-based refinement filter for log trace annotation.
Applied after selection admits a workload.
If omitted, no additional filtering is applied.

ttl.description:
Trace annotation cache TTL.
If omitted, `30m0s` is used.

size.description:
Trace annotation cache size.
If omitted, `128` is used.

workers.description:
Trace annotation async writer worker count.
If omitted, `8` is used.

channel_len.description:
Trace annotation async writer channel length.
If omitted, `500` is used.

Correlation.description: Trace-context correlation feature controls for external streams.

log_trace_annotation.description:
Trace-context annotation controls for process logs.
If omitted, defaults are used.

enabled.description:
Enable SQL traces/metrics.
If omitted, signal defaults are used.

filters.description:
Signal-specific SQL filters.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

heuristic_detect.description:
Enable heuristic SQL protocol detection.
If omitted, false is used.

buffer_size.description:
MySQL parser buffer size.
If omitted, `0` is used.

prepared_statements_cache_size.description:
MySQL prepared statements cache size.
If omitted, `1024` is used.

buffer_size.description:
PostgreSQL parser buffer size.
If omitted, `0` is used.

prepared_statements_cache_size.description:
PostgreSQL prepared statements cache size.
If omitted, `1024` is used.

buffer_size.description:
MSSQL parser buffer size.
If omitted, `0` is used.

prepared_statements_cache_size.description:
MSSQL prepared statements cache size.
If omitted, `1024` is used.

enabled.description:
Enable Redis traces/metrics.
If omitted, signal defaults are used.

filters.description:
Signal-specific Redis filters.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

enabled.description:
Enable Redis DB cache.
If omitted, false is used.

max_size.description:
Redis DB cache max size.
If omitted, `1000` is used.

enabled.description:
Enable Kafka traces/metrics.
If omitted, signal defaults are used.

filters.description:
Signal-specific Kafka filters.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

buffer_size.description:
Kafka parser buffer size.
If omitted, `0` is used.

topic_uuid_cache_size.description:
Kafka topic UUID cache size.
If omitted, `1024` is used.

enabled.description:
Enable MongoDB traces/metrics.
If omitted, signal defaults are used.

filters.description:
Signal-specific MongoDB filters.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

requests_cache_size.description:
Mongo request cache size.
If omitted, `1024` is used.

enabled.description:
Enable Couchbase traces/metrics.
If omitted, signal defaults are used.

filters.description:
Signal-specific Couchbase filters.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

db_cache_size.description:
Couchbase DB cache size.
If omitted, `1024` is used.

enabled.description:
Enable DNS traces/metrics.
If omitted, DNS defaults are used.

filters.description:
Signal-specific DNS filters.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

request_timeout.description:
DNS request timeout.
If omitted, `5s` is used.

enabled.description:
Enable GPU traces/metrics.
If omitted, signal defaults are used.

filters.description:
Signal-specific GPU filters.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

enabled_mode.description:
GPU instrumentation mode.
If omitted, `auto` is used.

RuntimeInjection.description: Runtime injection mechanism configuration. Controls whether a runtime injection (Go probes, Node.js SIGUSR1, Java agent) is enabled for workloads selected via the global selection rules.

enabled.description:
Enable this runtime injection mechanism.
If omitted, true is used.

filter.description:
Optional per-injector refinement filter.
If omitted, injection applies to all selected services.

enabled.description:
Enable Java agent injection.
If omitted, true is used.

filter.description:
Optional per-injector refinement filter.
If omitted, injection applies to all selected services.

enabled.description:
Enable Java agent debug mode.
If omitted, false is used.

bytecode_instrumentation.description:
Enable Java bytecode instrumentation debug logs.
If omitted, false is used.

attach_timeout.description:
Java attach timeout.
If omitted, `10s` is used.

Runtimes.description: Runtime injection mechanism configurations. These control how language-specific runtime instrumentation is injected into workloads selected via the global selection rules.

go.description:
Go runtime instrumentation controls.
If omitted, Go injection defaults are used.

nodejs.description:
Node.js runtime instrumentation controls.
If omitted, Node.js injection defaults are used.

java.description:
Java runtime instrumentation controls.
If omitted, Java injection defaults are used.

http.description:
HTTP instrumentation controls.
If omitted, HTTP defaults are used.

grpc.description:
gRPC instrumentation controls.
If omitted, gRPC defaults are used.

sql.description:
SQL instrumentation controls.
If omitted, SQL defaults are used.

redis.description:
Redis instrumentation controls.
If omitted, Redis defaults are used.

kafka.description:
Kafka instrumentation controls.
If omitted, Kafka defaults are used.

mongo.description:
MongoDB instrumentation controls.
If omitted, MongoDB defaults are used.

couchbase.description:
Couchbase instrumentation controls.
If omitted, Couchbase defaults are used.

dns.description:
DNS instrumentation controls.
If omitted, DNS defaults are used.

gpu.description:
GPU event instrumentation controls.
If omitted, GPU defaults are used.

capture.description: Packet capture controls and network-sourced filtering.

enabled.description:
Enable network capture.
If omitted, false is used.

source.description:
Network capture source implementation.
Values include: `socket_filter`, `tc`.
If omitted, `socket_filter` is used.

buffer_size.description:
TCP parser/capture buffer size.
If omitted, `0` is used.

agent_ip.description: Agent IP override for network flow telemetry.

agent_ip_interface.description: Interface selection for deriving the agent IP.

agent_ip_family.description: IP family used for derived agent IP selection.

filters.description:
Signal-specific filters applied to network capture output.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

guess_ports.description: Port guessing policy for unknown-initiator flows.

enabled.description:
Enable TCP stats telemetry.
If omitted, false is used.

features.description:
Enabled TCP stats families.
If omitted, no stats families are enabled.

agent_ip.description: Agent IP override for stats telemetry.

agent_ip_interface.description: Interface selection for deriving the agent IP.

agent_ip_family.description: IP family used for derived agent IP selection.

filters.description:
Signal-specific filters applied to stats telemetry.
If omitted, no filtering is applied.

Enrich.description: Enrichment configuration. Additional implementation-specific enrichment settings are allowed.

enrichers.description:
Enable/disable named enrichers and set enricher options.
If omitted, implementation defaults are used.

kubernetes.description:
Kubernetes metadata enricher configuration.
When running OBI as a standalone daemon this enricher provides k8s pod/namespace/deployment metadata.
When running OBI as a Collector receiver, consider setting `mode: disabled` and using the
`k8sattributesprocessor` instead to avoid duplicate k8s API queries.
If omitted, implementation defaults are used.

mode.description:
Kubernetes enricher activation mode.
`autodetect`: enable if a Kubernetes environment is detected (default).
`enabled`: always enable.
`disabled`: disable. Recommended when running as a Collector receiver and using `k8sattributesprocessor`.
If omitted, `autodetect` is used.

service_name.description:
Service name derivation controls.
If omitted, implementation defaults are used.

attributes.description:
Attribute enrichment rules and defaults.
If omitted, implementation defaults are used.
